title: Internship
company: BPMSPH (Balai Pengujian Mutu dan Sertifikasi Produk Hewan)
description: Developing an application for performance accountability assessment, covering the entire process from design and implementation to testing and deployment. Additionally, handling various media-related tasks, including creating posters, banners, infographics, and documentary videos.

title: Lecturer Assistant
description: Responsible for ensuring that students can conduct practical sessions effectively, developing materials and modules, and actively engaging as a practitioner. Also served as a course coordinator at various times: in March 2024 for Computer Graphics, in October 2024 for Geographic Information Systems, and currently for Text Mining.
